title: Buttery Middle-easter Flatbread Flatbread
description: A weeknight flatbread dish featuring sugar and pressure-cooked for a flaky texture and a hint of sweetness.

ingredients.name: active dry yeast
ingredients.notes: make sure yeast is active before using

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, yeast, and salt. Mix well to combine.
Gradually add in water, mixing until dough forms.
Knead dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place dough in a lightly oiled bowl, cover with plastic wrap, and let rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Punch down dough and shape into a round or oblong shape.
Place dough in pressure cooker and cook for 10 minutes.
Remove from pressure cooker and let cool for 5 minutes.
Melt butter in a small saucepan over low heat.
Brush melted butter evenly onto flatbread, then sprinkle with sesame seeds if desired.
Cut into wedges or squares and serve warm.
